content.p: The administrative service of the city shall be divided into unclassified and classified service;
The unclassified service shall comprise the following officers and positions:

City manager, city attorney, city auditor, city clerk, the head of each department and subordinate attorneys within the city attorney's office hired after the effective date of this Charter amendment.
All members of boards and commissions.
Positions in any class or grade created for a special or temporary purpose for a period of not longer than 90 days in any one fiscal year.
Persons employed to render professional, scientific, technical or expert services of any occasional or exceptional character.
Volunteer members of the fire department.
Part-time employees paid on an hourly or per diem basis.
The classified service shall comprise all positions not specifically included by this section in the unclassified service.
